info.title: PyBOG API
info.description: Core API for generating Niagara BOG files from HVAC specifications

post.description: Resume a paused n8n workflow with an approval signal.
Resume a paused n8n workflow with a change-request signal and feedback.

get.description: Polling fallback to retrieve recent chat messages for a session.
Server-Sent Events stream for live workflow progress/messages.

post.description: Allow n8n or the API to push progress events that stream to clients.
Create a new session with optional initial message

get.description: List all sessions with optional statistics
Get detailed information about a specific session

delete.description: Delete a session and all associated data

post.description: Duplicate a session with its messages but not analysis

get.description: Export session data for backup or sharing
Get most recent sessions
Return complete session restoration payload.

post.description: Persist a chat message and optionally update session state/name.

Store uploaded file under data/uploads/<session_id> and register in Postgres.
Returns a stable file_id and preview/download URLs so the frontend can persist and view files after refresh.

get.description: Download a file from a session

post.description: Save analysis results for a session

Create a session that works with both n8n workflows and new UI
- Creates entry in sessions table (for both systems)
- Optionally adds initial message to both message tables

Add a message that will be visible to both n8n workflows and new UI
- Inserts into session_messages (n8n uses this)
- Triggers sync to messages table (new UI uses this)

Save analysis that works with both n8n workflows and new UI
- Saves to hvac_analysis_state (n8n uses this)
- Also saves to analysis_results (new UI can use this)

Save BOG file that works with both n8n workflows and new UI
- Saves to session_bog_files (n8n uses this)
- Also saves to bog_files (new UI can use this)

get.description:
Get session data from both n8n tables and new tables
Returns unified view that works with both systems
Get recent sessions with unified data

post.description:
Upload and process documents through n8n workflow (Analysis - Workflow)
Files are streamed to n8n; if a Wait node responds with resumeUrl, we normalize the payload.
Send message to chat workflow for AI processing
Handle approval/rejection/modification of waiting workflows

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream for real-time workflow updates

post.description:
Re-stream persisted files for a session into the Analysis workflow.
This is used when retrying after a refresh where browser File objects are gone.

get.description: Get current workflow status and pending actions

patch.description:
Reverse proxy for n8n webhooks.
- Preserves method, query string, and body (including multipart uploads)
- Forwards most headers except hop-by-hop ones
- Streams response back to the client

put.description:
Reverse proxy for n8n webhooks.
